name: One-Apiece Meat Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumber and cut it in half lengthwise. Scoop out the seeds from each half using a spoon. Coarsely shred the remaining cucumber to make 1 cup. Slice any leftover cucumber for garnish.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the shredded cucumber, ground beef, bread crumbs, grated onion, salt, pepper, and egg. Divide the mixture into four portions.
3. Unwrap four cheese slices and fold each into a piece measuring approximately 1 1/2 x 3/4 x 1/2 inches.
4. Shape each portion of meat around one cheese piece to form four oval loaves measuring about 4 x 2 inches. Place the loaves in a 12 x 8-inch baking dish and cover with waxed paper.
5. Cook at medium-high heat (70% power) for 9 minutes. Remove the waxed paper, rotating the dish slightly, and top each loaf with a slice of cheese. Continue cooking at medium-high heat for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Let the meat loaves stand for 3 minutes before removing them from the baking dish. Arrange on a warm plate. Garnish with cucumber slices.
